---
name: Feature Request
about: Suggest an idea or improvement for the project
title: "[Feature]: "
labels: enhancement
assignees: ''
---

## Problem Description

A clear and concise description of the problem or limitation you are experiencing.

**Example:** "I'm always frustrated when [...]"

## Proposed Solution

A clear and concise description of what you want to happen.

## Alternatives Considered

A clear and concise description of any alternative solutions or features you've considered.

## Value for the Project

How would this feature benefit the Factory-X Business Models project or its users?

- [ ] Improves methodology documentation
- [ ] Enhances workshop materials
- [ ] Improves AI assistant capabilities
- [ ] Improves developer experience
- [ ] Other (please describe)

## Additional Context

Add any other context, mockups, or screenshots about the feature request here.
